artPrompt: A grim mid-century meeting room where rows of slumped, glassy-eyed attendees sit frozen at long beige tables, faint cyan stun-glow rings hovering over each head, while a flickering projector throws a blank pale rectangle of light onto the wall. Stacks of unmarked sign-in sheets sit untouched. The hypnotic rows recede upward into fluorescent haze. Wide 4:3 landscape, oppressive bureaucratic stillness, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Mandatory Orientation Seminar
text: All creatures must attend the seminar. Tap all creatures and put a stun counter on each creature you don't control. (Attendance is mandatory. There will be a sign-in sheet. There will be a sign-out sheet. They will not match.)
flavorText: Hour one: housekeeping. Hour two: housekeeping, continued. Hour three: a video from 1987.
